microsoft_ft: Owned end-to-end engagements with enterprise customers (Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp), serving as the on-site technical implementation point of contact to deploy Azure resilience solutions and drive **$14M+ business impact** across mission-critical workloads.

Led product rollout and integration of an internal Resilience Automation Platform 0→1, defining requirements and self-service deployment capabilities that **reduced operational toil by 30%** and aligned product direction with customers' on-the-ground reality.

Served as bridge lead for a **sovereign-cloud network isolation test** tied to a $1.5B+ contract, validating IP/subnetting, routing, and core network functions while coordinating cross-functional engineering teams to meet stringent security objectives.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new model for continuous validation under executive visibility.

Cultivated relationships across all levels of seniority to cut through bureaucratic obstacles, directing **14 cross-org recovery executions** and creating executive presentations that secured leadership buy-in for high-stakes deployments.

Scaled team leverage by building an internal **AI agent** and tailoring automation scripts that reduced planning cycle time by 39% and increased drill capacity by 21%, automating tedious tasks to consistently deliver for customers.
microsoft_2023: Championed product adoption for AI-driven code generation workflows, conducting hands-on customer demos and training sessions that drove **utilization across 14 teams** and saved 37 engineering hours monthly through tailored technical enablement.

Influenced the product roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation by facilitating **11+ user interviews** with Azure service teams, translating ground-level customer challenges into prioritized engineering requirements.

Optimized data integrity and retrieval by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered **semantic search** tool, cutting lookup time by 83% and improving cross-team operational efficiency.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched cloud regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework spanning 140+ engineering teams across organizational lines.

Mobilized a product strategy to mitigate operational toil during region launches, conducting discovery with **20+ service teams** to identify 81 hours of manual effort per region and building a roadmap to automate critical deployment paths.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to make data-driven decisions, target automation gaps, and prioritize high-impact support for time-sensitive launches.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy and mapping networking and station dependencies across 1,200+ sites under tight operational requirements.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process amid shifting priorities.

Drove strategic alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering teams to implement automated **CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual deployment toil.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing field operations and managing the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals through a new CRM process, owning customer relationships from intake to delivery.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by 13% and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first **go-to-market strategy**, optimizing the website and Google profile to respond promptly to customer needs.
Improved leadership pricing models by conducting financial profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records**, identifying and sealing margin leaks to inform data-driven business decisions.

tailoring_notes: Reframed FT role around customer-facing solutions architecture: on-site technical POC, product rollout/integration, cutting through bureaucracy, and network isolation/security work to mirror the JD.
Surfaced networking, scripting/automation, and security keywords throughout; added Wireshark and networking fundamentals to skills to match hard requirements.
Used 'Technical Program Manager' labels as closest allowed analog to Solutions Architect; emphasized executive presentations, cross-team influence, and ambiguity navigation per competencies.
